overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The player character crosses a neon-lit intersection with holographic billboards, walks along wet sidewalks past modern architecture, ascends an illuminated staircase, and enters a covered pedestrian walkway with vibrant pink neon lighting.

events.description: turning left to follow the street and approach the sidewalk
vehicle passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet multi-lane street and continuing along the road toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: large illuminated building sign with white lettering
large floating digital advertisements with various imagery

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wide cyberpunk intersection at night during heavy rain. The camera crosses the wet asphalt road with holographic billboards floating above, passing a traffic light pole as a car drives by. The SECCHO building sign looms in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with modern commercial buildings

events.description: moving from open intersection to building sidewalk with palm trees
turning right toward the illuminated staircase entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the modern geometric building, approaching the stairs

notable_agents.action: person in red pants and jacket walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: white and glass angular building facade with geometric patterns
wet concrete pavement with yellow tactile paving
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
modern street lamps with cyan neon lighting
crosswalk signal box with illuminated walk sign

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open street onto the concrete sidewalk, the camera walks alongside a striking modern geometric building with white angular facades. Palm trees line the path as the character approaches an illuminated staircase, passing a pedestrian in red clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated outdoor staircase between commercial buildings

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide illuminated staircase with cyan lighting
reaching the top of the stairs and approaching the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide staircase with cyan illuminated edges, moving toward the upper level

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with bright cyan LED lighting on edges
metal railings with integrated cyan neon lighting
horizontal white neon light tubes spanning above the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a grand illuminated staircase with glowing cyan edges and overhead neon beams. The modern geometric building falls away to the right as the climb continues, with holographic billboards still visible in the background against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with neon light installations

events.description: entering the covered walkway with pink neon rectangular frames

agents.ego_description: walking through the futuristic covered walkway with pink neon lighting and palm tree planters

entered.detail: series of rectangular pink and purple neon light frames forming a tunnel effect
dark overhead structure with integrated lighting
large rectangular planters containing palm trees
highly polished dark floor reflecting the pink neon lights
modern concrete seating along the walkway
large illuminated screen showing figures on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene transitions into a sleek covered promenade lined with vibrant pink neon rectangular frames. The reflective marble floor mirrors the colorful lighting as palm trees in planters line the right side. The camera moves steadily through this futuristic corridor with holographic displays visible on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection into a sleek, neon-lit pedestrian promenade. It begins by crossing a wet asphalt road beneath floating holographic billboards, passing a traffic light and a passing car as the SECCHO building looms in the distance. As the camera moves from the open street onto the concrete sidewalk, the environment shifts toward modern geometric architecture and palm trees, passing a pedestrian in red before approaching an illuminated staircase. The scene then ascends a grand staircase with glowing cyan edges and overhead neon beams, leaving the angular white facades behind while holographic displays remain visible against the night sky. Finally, the climb leads into a covered promenade where the lighting transforms into vibrant pink rectangular frames reflecting off a polished marble floor as the camera glides past planters and wall-mounted holograms.
